action.reasoning: Observation: Only eval submitted gave mIoU=0.0007 (essentially zero). The pretrained mit-b5 model should give ~47-50% mIoU. This indicates a fundamental bug - likely the saved checkpoint at checkpoints/pretrained/ is corrupted (was saved with invalid ignore_index parameter). Analysis: Need to diagnose by loading nvidia/mit-b5 directly from HuggingFace cache and comparing with the saved checkpoint. Decision: Run diagnostic script to identify the issue, then fix predict.py and save a proper checkpoint.
